title: T-004 — SET-001 Wizard Launcher: auto-show route guard for new orgs
prompt:
Implement the SET-001 Wizard Launcher per PRD §14.4: when an org's `onboarding_state.current_step < 6` and `current_step` ∉ `completed_steps`, redirect any user landing on the app shell to `/onboarding/[step]` corresponding to current_step.

Landing behavior: server-component check via `getOnboardingState` (from T-002) on the (admin) layout entry; non-onboarding routes redirect with Next.js `redirect()`. Once wizard completes (current_step=6 AND 6 ∈ completed_steps), guard is bypassed and user lands on default home.

Do NOT implement individual step pages (T-005..T-010), backend actions (T-001/T-002/T-003), or the celebration screen (T-010).

RED test command: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-launcher.guard`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Auto-redirect logic for new orgs landing in app shell while onboarding incomplete.
pipeline_inputs.details: Implemented as a server-component guard in apps/web/app/(app)/layout.tsx (or a small util it imports). Reads onboarding_state via T-002 action; if current_step <= 6 and not all completed, redirect to /onboarding/[current_step]. Vitest covers redirect decisions for 4 state shapes.
out_of_scope: Middleware-level enforcement (gap-backlog T-02SETe-007a; out of scope here)
acceptance_criteria: Given onboarding_state.current_step=1 and completed_steps=[], when user GETs /, then response is redirect to /onboarding/1.
Given onboarding_state.current_step=6 and 6 ∈ completed_steps, when user GETs /, then response is 200 (no redirect).
Given onboarding_state.current_step=3 and completed_steps=[1,2], when user GETs /admin/anywhere, then redirect to /onboarding/3.
Given vitest spec covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED: vitest spec asserting redirect targets for all 4 AC.
GREEN: implement guard; all AC pass.
risk_red_lines: Do not use client-side redirect — must be server-side via Next.js redirect() in server component.
Do not bypass guard for any role — even admins must complete onboarding (per PRD §14.3 wizard is mandatory).
